/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/app.dir/mesh/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/shaders/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/glad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/window/window.cpp.o -o app  /Users/sashamattison/CPP/Unix/dependencies/library/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo -framework CoreFoundation
